hints.description: This company is a global leader in pizza delivery and carryout. They operate through company-owned stores and franchise stores, offering a wide variety of pizzas, sides, and desserts. Known for its technological innovation in delivery, including GPS tracking and online ordering, it has adapted well to changing consumer habits.
hints.funFact1: In 1989, founder ***** *** famously mortgaged his house to buy the then-struggling company for just $130,000, believing in its potential for turnaround.
hints.funFact2: The company has experimented with various delivery methods over the years, including drones and autonomous vehicles, demonstrating a commitment to exploring cutting-edge technology to improve efficiency and reach customers.
